stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP696 file 4.11.
Is the aircraft configuration within limits if it possesses a Zero Fuel Mass (ZFM) of 50 000 kg and its Center of Gravity (CG) is positioned at 28% of the Mean Aerodynamic Chord (MAC)?

options.b: No, the CG exceeds the forward limit.
options.c: No, the CG exceeds the aft limit.
options.d: No, the ZFM exceeds the ZFM limit.
